title: Chinese Omelette
description: A simple and delicious Chinese-inspired omelette recipe with moist and savory flavors.
instructions: Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together.
Heat the vegetable oil in a small non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the soy sauce to the pan and stir to combine.
Pour the eggs into the pan and let them cook for 2-3 minutes.
Use a spatula to gently lift and fold the edges of the omelette towards the center.
Once the eggs are almost set, use the spatula to fold the omelette in half.
Cook for an additional 30 seconds to 1 minute, until the eggs are fully set.
Slide the omelette out of the pan onto a plate and serve hot.
